title: Update WhatsApp message text to proper artwork inquiry

requirements.text: Replace all occurrences of the WhatsApp pre-filled message text 'Hello Mudit Sharma' (used in WhatsApp href/link parameters across Navigation, HeroSection, ContactSection, and Footer components) with a proper artwork inquiry message such as: 'Hello, I came across your artwork portfolio and I'm interested in discussing a potential project. Could you please share more details about your services and availability?'

quotes: Please change the WhatsApp text Hello Mudit Sharma To a proper text query regarding the artwork

acceptanceCriteria: The WhatsApp link in the Navigation 'Hire Me' button opens WhatsApp with the new artwork inquiry message pre-filled.
The WhatsApp link in the HeroSection 'Hire Me' CTA button opens WhatsApp with the new artwork inquiry message pre-filled.
The WhatsApp card in ContactSection uses the new inquiry message in any WhatsApp href link.
The WhatsApp link in the Footer uses the new inquiry message.
No instance of 'Hello Mudit Sharma' remains as a WhatsApp pre-filled message anywhere in the frontend codebase.
The message text is professional, contextually relevant to artwork/mural inquiries, and written in English.

constraints: Do not change any other WhatsApp-related UI text labels (e.g., button labels like 'Hire Me' or 'WhatsApp' should remain unchanged).
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Changing the WhatsApp phone number or contact details.
Modifying any backend logic or data.
Redesigning any UI components or layouts.
Changing any other contact section content beyond the WhatsApp pre-filled message text.
